why_eden.note: Eden was generating short signals all session. Operator had long-side bias and missed first 3.5hr of signal. Late entry at 17:01 UTC (3.5hr after first signal). capital_flow confirms sustained outflow.

size_decision: Tier 2 ($2,044 USD) — late entry reduces conviction vs Tier 1. Signal valid but intraday momentum mostly captured.
lesson_in_progress: Eden SHORT signal (mod_stack <=0.92) was firing from session open. Operator long-side bias caused 3.5hr miss. v0.3 must include SHORT watchlist scanning in pre-market recon.

outcome.exit_reason_detail: Eden sector_wave flipped GROWING→FADING + capital_flow cumulative outflow went flat (24min delta only -$91 vs prior -$3-5K/min pace). mod_stack not flipped yet but raw microstructure confirms momentum exhaustion. Price bounced +1.36% from day low 250.50; target 250.10 missed by $0.40.
outcome.notes: First US validation trade closed in profit. SHORT thesis valid: MDB -5.2% intraday from 269.54 to 253.9, day low 250.5 (-7.1% peak). Entry late (+3.5hr after first Eden signal) reduced capture to 0.34% vs theoretical ~2% if entered at session open. v0.3 lesson: pre-market SHORT scanning required.
